penalties.description: Task incomplete - only outbound transfers completed, return transfers not performed within the video timeframe.

score_components.formula_applied: automatic zero due to auto-fail penalty

reasoning: Both models agreed on completion time of 147 seconds. Major disagreement on task completion status: Claude identified incomplete task (no return transfers), while GPT-4o claimed return transfers occurred but with one lost object. Given that Claude's phases_detected only shows outbound transfers and the FLS rubric requires complete bidirectional transfer, the incomplete_task penalty takes precedence over lost_object penalty, resulting in zero score.
